title: Scrobble
description: A scrobble submission representing a single track play sent to Last.fm.

timestamp.description: The time the track started playing, in UNIX timestamp format.

albumArtist.description: The album artist when different from the track artist.

trackNumber.description: The track number on the album.

chosenByUser.description: 1 if the user chose this track, 0 if chosen by algorithm or radio.

streamId.description: The stream id for this track received from a radio service.
